{{Infobox event
| name = Dread War
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

''See also: [[Dread War Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The Dread War was a massive conflict centered on the attempt to eliminate the [[Dreadgods]], ancient and highly intelligent entities that exist to consume the world. The war was characterized by an ambitious project to destroy these beings, which resulted in a catastrophic slaughter of the world's ruling class. During the fighting, twelve [[Monarchs]] launched an attack against the [[Wandering Titan]]; however, the other three [[Dreadgods]] awakened to defend their kin, leading to the deaths of most [[Monarchs]] and many powerful [[Sages]]. The conflict caused immense environmental destruction, leaving vast regions like the grasslands chewed up and ruined. The aftermath of the war fundamentally altered the world's power structure. Many great families and houses were obliterated, while others, such as [[House Arelius]], survived by hiding. Only a small number of organizations remained, and only two possessed [[Monarchs]] to lead them. To rebuild and cultivate a new generation of powerful leaders, the surviving two [[Monarchs]] organized the [[Uncrowned King]] tournament. The war also forced many Underlords to accelerate their advancement, often at the cost of their future potential.}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Dread War]] disrupted [[Reigan Shen]]'s [[fate]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Dread War]] involved twelve [[Monarchs]] attacking the [[Wandering Titan]] to destroy the [[Dreadgods]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Dread War]] was caused by the elimination of the [[Dreadgods]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The Dread War stands as a significant historical event defined by the simultaneous rampage of all four [[Dreadgods]]. This conflict marked the last time these four entities acted in unison, an occurrence that included the death of [[Emala]]. While the war remains a part of the past, all four [[Dreadgods]] have recently been awakened for the first time since that era.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Dread War]] is a past event involving the four [[Dreadgods]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2">''Dreadgod'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|All four [[Dreadgods]] have been awakened for the first time since the [[Dread War]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Dread War]] is a historical event.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5">''Dreadgod'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Emala]] died during the [[Dread War]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Dread War]] was the last time all four [[Dreadgods]] rampaged at the same time.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8">''Dreadgod'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Dread War]] was a conflict that occurred before the [[Sovereign Drum]] was made.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2">''Waybound'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The last [[Dread War]] was a time when the current chance to be rid of the [[Dreadgods]] did not exist.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24">''Waybound'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Dread War]] destroyed much of the grasslands on the [[Rosegold continent]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Dread War]] was a war in which powerful [[Sages]] were killed.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Dread War]] is a historical event witnessed by [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
